TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nansiku i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Nansiku. u kasalumaluma' nu Nansiku sa, 123 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 401 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 390 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan94%, zumazuma2%.
S.PHON: nansiku i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu nansiku. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu nansiku sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan**%, zumazuma*%.
S.FORM: Nansiku i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Nansiku. u kasalumaluma' nu Nansiku sa, 123 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 401 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 390 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan94%, zumazuma2%.
S.PHON: nansiku i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu nansiku. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu nansiku sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan**%, zumazuma*%.
